name: openai
context: OpenAI ecosystem — chat completions, embeddings, assistants, image generation, and fine-tuning
info: Complete OpenAI API integration. Covers chat completions (GPT-4, GPT-4o), embeddings for RAG pipelines, assistants API with tool use, DALL-E image generation, Whisper transcription, and fine-tuning workflows. All skills use the official OpenAI SDK with proper streaming, retry, and token management.
author: dojo-community
